prompt: A [food subject] behaving as [non-food analogue] — [lens] wide enough to show the full [non-food analogue] behaviour, the [food subject] completely photorealistic in its material quality while performing [impossible food action] with total physical commitment, [setting] treating the behaviour as unremarkable, [light quality] photorealistic and making no special case for the impossibility, other [food context elements] present and behaving normally, surrealist food world still, 16:9 Create this as a simple cinematic thumbnail still for a prompt library card. Clean single-scene composition. Readable at small size. Strong central subject. No text, no interface chrome, no split panels, no collage, no before-after comparisons.
negative_prompt: text overlay, typography, UI chrome, dashboard, website layout, collage, split screen, diptych, triptych, before-and-after, watermark, logo, cluttered composition, too many objects, cartoon, illustration, duplicate objects, warped geometry, unreadable tiny details

settings.lighting: clean, readable, high-contrast lighting suited for a small homepage or library card
settings.camera_angle: single clear hero framing that matches the prompt
settings.depth_of_field: moderate depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: clean silhouette, realistic materials, readable at small size
